title: Create and finalize a walk-in sale
description: This test verifies that a walk-in invoice can be created from the billing screen with products, payment mode, and finalization, resulting in a saved sale.

steps.description: Add multiple products to the cart
Verify the invoice is available for review

title: Calculate totals and GST on an invoice
description: This test verifies that adding products on the billing screen updates invoice totals and GST correctly before finalization.

steps.description: Select a customer or choose a walk-in sale
Add multiple products to the cart
Review the calculated totals and GST
Verify the updated totals are displayed
Verify GST is included in the invoice summary

title: Print-ready invoice can be reached after sale creation
description: This test verifies that a finalized billing transaction reaches the invoice view that supports printing from the app.

steps.description: Verify the invoice view is displayed
Verify the print option is available

title: Create a product and see it in inventory
description: This test verifies that a new product can be added from the products screen and then appears in the inventory list.

steps.description: Add a new product with its details
Verify the new product appears in the inventory list
Verify the product details are available

title: Search a product and update its stock
description: This test verifies that a product can be found by name or barcode and its stock quantity can be edited and saved.

steps.description: Search for a product by name or barcode
Verify the updated stock quantity is shown
Verify the product remains available in the inventory view

title: Create a party record
description: This test verifies that a new customer or supplier can be created and appears in the party ledger list.

steps.description: Verify the new party appears in the ledger list
Verify the party record is available for selection

title: Record a payment or collection for a party
description: This test verifies that a party transaction can be saved and the ledger history reflects the new payment or collection.

steps.description: Verify the transaction appears in the party history
Verify the party balance is updated

title: Handle an empty inventory state by adding the first product
description: This test verifies that the products screen supports creating the first catalog item when the inventory list starts empty.

steps.description: Add a new product with its details
Verify the inventory list is no longer empty
Verify the new product is listed

title: Review updated party history after a transaction
description: This test verifies that the party ledger shows the latest transaction details after recording a payment or collection.

steps.description: Verify the updated transaction history is displayed
Verify the balance summary reflects the change

title: Dashboard reflects recent financial activity
description: This test verifies that the dashboard shows updated financial overview data after a sale or expense is recorded.

steps.description: Verify financial overview data is displayed

title: Save a daily business expense
description: This test verifies that an expense entry can be created and stored from the expenses screen.

steps.description: Verify the expense appears in the expense list
Verify the saved total is updated

title: Reports include recorded business activity
description: This test verifies that the reports screen shows summary data reflecting sales, stock, party payments, and expenses.

steps.description: Verify business activity analytics are visible

title: Maintain local changes while background sync is active
description: A user can make a local change after enabling background sync and still see the new data reflected in the app.

steps.description: Paste a valid Neon Cloud connection URL into the connection field
Verify the new expense is visible in the expenses list
Verify the app remains responsive while background sync is enabled

title: Connect cloud sync successfully
description: A user can enter a Neon Cloud connection URL and complete cloud synchronization from the settings screen.

steps.description: Paste a valid Neon Cloud connection URL into the connection field
Verify a successful sync status is visible
Verify the settings screen remains usable after sync completes

title: Configure cloud sync from settings
description: This test verifies that the settings screen accepts a cloud connection string and can start synchronization.

steps.description: Enter a Neon Cloud connection URL
Verify a synchronization status is displayed

title: Keep local data available after sync setup
description: A user can return to the app after configuring cloud sync and still access previously saved local data.

steps.description: Paste a valid Neon Cloud connection URL into the connection field
Verify the dashboard is displayed with local financial data
Verify the app continues to show saved records

title: Enable background sync
description: A user can turn on background sync after providing a cloud connection URL and keep using the app while sync stays active.

steps.description: Paste a valid Neon Cloud connection URL into the connection field
Verify the app remains usable while sync is active

title: Recover from an invalid cloud connection string
description: A user sees validation feedback when an invalid cloud connection string is entered instead of starting synchronization.

steps.description: Paste an invalid connection string into the connection field
Verify a connection validation error is visible

title: Show an empty sync state before configuration
description: A user sees that cloud synchronization is not yet configured when opening settings on a fresh app state.

steps.description: Verify an empty or unconfigured sync state is visible
Verify the cloud connection field is available for setup
